query: SELECT messageId, sessionId, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM messages WHERE messageId IS NOT NULL GROUP BY messageId, sessionId HAVING cnt > 1 LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4Nn3NsgWfgWMEmv.e05a65be2af1 --database EKvcVicuVoUxTnzjSKzgdk --execute SELECT messageId, sessionId, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM messages WHERE messageId IS NOT NULL GROUP BY messageId, sessionId HAVING cnt > 1 LIMIT 5;
